{{Infobox character
| name = Endross Traveler
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Endross Traveler]] is a traveler [[Leah]] was thinking of.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c2">''House of Blades'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Cormac]] is an [[Endross Traveler]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|An [[Endross Traveler]] can control an [[Endross Gate]] without it exploding.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|A single [[Endross Traveler]] in loose-fitting white clothes emerged from the [[Endross Gate]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
